title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Cancel
scenario: Verify login/logout flow in App Settings: user can log in, see account details, cancel logout, and remain logged in.
steps: Start the app as a quest, tap App Settings icon, go to General > Account.
Tap Log in, then Continue and log in with credentials. Verify 'Your account' text is visible with Name and Email fields populated.
Tap Log out. Verify a login dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options.
Tap Cancel. Verify the dialog disappears and the user remains logged in.
expected: After step 2: "Your account" text is visible with Name and Email fields populated. After step 3: A login dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options. After step 4: The dialog disappears and the user remains logged in.
